instruction:
다음 입력으로 Markdown 취약점 블록을 생성하라.
규칙: Markdown만, 헤딩은 ##만, 이모지/표 금지, 한 줄 불릿.
출력은 한국어로 작성.
모든 항목(End-Point/영향/설명/근거/대응/조치)을 반드시 출력.
근거는 증거/재현에서만 요약, 부족 시 '-' 사용.
input:
입력:
제목: Django Debug Page - Cross-Site Scripting
심각도: MEDIUM
카테고리: CVE
엔드포인트: http://localhost:9991/www/XSS/XSS_level1.php/create_user/
CVE: cve-2017-12794
설명: Django 1.10.x before 1.10.8 and 1.11.x before 1.11.5 has HTML autoescaping disabled in a portion of the template for the technical 500 debug page. We detected that right circumstances (DEBUG=True) are present to allow a cross-site scripting attack.
영향: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript code in the context of the victim's browser, leading to potential session hijacking, defacement, or theft of sensitive information.
증거: 
재현: curl -X 'GET' -d '' -H 'Accept: */*' -H 'Accept-Language: en' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_8_2) AppleWebKit/536.26.17 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/6.0.2 Safari/536.26.17' 'http://localhost:9991/www/XSS/XSS_level1.php/create_user/?username=%3Cscript%3Ealert(document.domain)%3C%2Fscript%3E'
대응/조치 힌트:
